args: set -euo pipefail; env_file="${TELEGRAM_MCP_ENV_FILE:-$HOME/.codex/telegram-mcp.env}"; if [ -f "$env_file" ]; then set -a; . "$env_file"; set +a; fi; if [ -z "${TELEGRAM_TOKEN:-}" ] || [ -z "${CHAT_ID:-}" ]; then echo "Telegram Communicator is not configured. Run /telegram-setup first." >&2; exit 1; fi; exec npx -y @mseep/mcp-communicator-telegram
telegram-communicator.note: Loads Telegram credentials from ~/.codex/telegram-mcp.env, then starts @mseep/mcp-communicator-telegram.
